testcase.name: runScenario["Verify ticket time", "Milli Piyango Ticket Detail Test Cases"](1)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //span[normalize-space()='Rastgele']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

Dec 21, 2024 7:20:06 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 131 Dec 21, 2024 7:20:06 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 131.0.6778.205. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.14.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
